issuers.description: Simulated Bundesdruckerei issuer hosted on the Animo EUDI Playground. Issues PID, mDL and Age Verification credentials.
Simulated RDW (Dutch Vehicle Registration Authority) issuer hosted on the Animo EUDI Playground. Issues Vehicle Registration Certificate (mVRC).
Simulated telecom organisation issuer hosted on the Animo EUDI Playground. Issues MSISDN credentials.
OID4VCI issuer used in the Aruba wallet environment for issuing EUDI PID credentials in mso_mdoc format.

This sandbox credential issuer from the Dutch Tax Administration (Belastingdienst), hosted by Credenco, supports a range of credentials used in pilots, experiments, and demonstrations to explore interoperable digital trust.

credentialConfigurations.displayName: Statement of payment behaviour compliance with tax obligations

issuers.description: Certizen issues GLEIF vLEI credentials in ACDC format through its CertLei platform, enabling organizational identity and role-based assertions for secure and interoperable digital interactions across finance, trade, and compliance use cases.
CFCA issues GLEIF vLEI credentials in ACDC format for organizational identity and role-based assertions, supporting trusted digital interactions across finance, government, and enterprise use cases.
This is a demo credential issuer for the fictitious "Tulip Bank", hosted by Credenco. It provides credentials that can be used across pilots, experiments, and demos.
This is the EUDI reference credential issuer that can be used for testing, demonstration, and pilot applications, providing a set of credentials aligned with the EUDI reference architecture.
This is the reference credential issuer from the EWC project, hosted by the University of the Aegean. It issues a range of credentials used for various use cases in the EWC EUDI Large Scale Pilot

The FIDES community credential issuer provides sandbox credentials for testing interoperability within the FIDES Community Platform. It issues a range of verifiable credentials for use in pilot projects.
A sandbox issuer simulating MijnOverheid credential issuance for testing purposes within the FIDES Community Platform.
OID4VCI issuer for the Findynet pension demo

issuers.displayName: International Patient Summary demo - Procivis issuer
issuers.description: OID4VCI issuer for Findynet IPS (International Patient Summary) credentials
Finema issues GLEIF vLEI credentials in ACDC format, enabling organizational identity and role-based assertions for trusted digital interactions across government, finance, and enterprise use cases.
Issuer operated by GLEIF for issuing Qualified vLEI Issuer (QVI) credentials within the vLEI ecosystem.

Global vLEI is a Qualified vLEI Issuer (QVI) accredited by GLEIF, issuing Legal Entity, Official Organizational Role (OOR), and Engagement Context Role (ECR) credentials in ACDC format for trusted digital interactions.
EUDI Wallet playground issuer by Hovi. Issues a broad range of EUDI credential types including PID, EHIC, Diploma, IBAN, Photo ID and more.
IATA contactless travel credentials (boarding pass and booking order) for IndiGo.

issuers.description: IATA contactless travel credentials (boarding pass and booking order) for Air New Zealand.

issuers.description: Sandbox credential issuer from iGrant.io used for demonstrating OpenID4VCI issuance flows and interoperability scenarios across multiple credential types.

This sandbox credential issuer from the Dutch Chamber of Commerce (Kamer van Koophandel), hosted by Credenco, supports a range of credentials used in pilots, experiments, and demonstrations to explore interoperable digital trust.

This sandbox credential issuer from MOSIP Inji Certify supports the issuance of insurance-related credentials in the MOSIP collab environment for testing OpenID4VCI flows and interoperability scenarios.
This sandbox credential issuer from MultiPaz supports the issuance of verious credentials for testing OpenID4VCI flows and interoperability scenarios.
Test issuer on the Namirial Wallet Studio platform. Issues PID, mDL, Age Verification and contact credentials.

Provenant issues GLEIF vLEI credentials in ACDC format, supporting verifiable communications and secure telecommunications use cases by enabling trusted organizational identity and role-based assertions.

SHECA issues GLEIF vLEI credentials in ACDC format for cross-border business scenarios, including organizational identity and role-based credentials used in KYC, identity authentication, and document signing flows.

issuers.displayName: Swiss E-ID Beta Credential Service Issuer
issuers.description: Sandbox credential issuer for the Swiss E-ID (swiyu) Public Beta. Supports issuance of Beta-ID credentials using OpenID4VCI with SD-JWT format via pre-authorized flows.
issuers.projectContext: Swiss E-ID (swiyu) Public Beta – Beta Credential Service (BCS)

issuers.description: Sandbox OID4VCI issuer provided by Talao.
Sandbox OID4VCI issuer operated by Thales (Unfold environment), supporting issuance of PID, mDL, and age verification credentials using both mdoc and SD-JWT formats.
Sandbox OID4VCI issuer operated by TOPPAN Digital for issuing PID credentials in both mso_mdoc and dc+sd-jwt formats.

TOPPAN issues GLEIF vLEI credentials in ACDC format for manufacturing, supply chain, trade, and financial scenarios, including organizational identity and role-based credentials used in trusted cross-border business processes.

TradeGo issues GLEIF vLEI credentials in ACDC format for digital trade and supply chain scenarios, including organizational identity and role-based credentials used in trade document exchange, financing, and cross-border business processes.
